text2fa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
text2fa.subtitleDisabled: Two-factor authentication is not enabled yet.
text2fa.textDisabled: Two-factor authentication adds an additional layer of security to your account by requiring more than just a password to log in.

dialog.title: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA)
dialog.subtitle: Setup authenticator app
dialog.text1: Use a phone app like 1Password, Authy, LastPass Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or Google Authenticator, etc. to get 2FA codes when prompted during sign-in.
text2: If you are unable to scan, enter

dialogDisable.title: Disable two-factor authentication (2FA)
dialogDisable.text: Two-factor authentication adds an additional layer of security to your account by requiring more than just a password to log in. Are you sure to continue?
